Many of you received the attachment below directly from Dave Forster.  In order to prepare for NewCo coming back online, we are going to use this list as the starting point to identify the "primary launch customers".  To that end please review this list and confirm that ALL of your primary counterparties are listed.  After Christmas, we will meet to reform the list by region and assign individual responsibilities.  The single objective of this effort is to confirm that we have every client identified as we move forward and further develop our launch strategy.
